title: Really dumb villager
description: Have you ever dreamed about finding the nitwit (dumb villager) more easily when looking for everyone except them? Me neither, but here it is!
body:
# Really dumb villager

Adds a sign at the back of the villager saying "I am dumb". That's it.\
I made this because I found it funny at the moment, so if you are too, don't hesitate to give it a try! Plus, it's discreet, even the nitwit didn't found out I put this on his back 🤫


I might improve it in the future. 

## How to use

1 - Download the version of your choice on the side of this page\
2 - Place the .zip (don't extract it) inside your `.minecraft/resourcepacks`\
3 - In game, put it above every other pack you could have\
4 - You're finished! Well done, and enjoy :)
